mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sensor_data (location, temperature, timestamp, humidity) VALUES ( #{location}, #{temperature}, CAST(#{timestamp} AS timestamptz), #{humidity} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, location, temperature, humidity, timestamp FROM sensor_data ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 100
SELECT DISTINCT location FROM sensor_data ORDER BY location
SELECT COALESCE(AVG(temperature)) AS temperature, COALESCE(AVG(humidity)) AS humidity FROM sensor_data WHERE location = #{location} AND timestamp >= #{start_time}::timestamptz
